message:
fix: Saturating arithmetic in error_boundary, ansi, geometry; remove dead code

- error_boundary.rs: Use saturating_add for coordinate offsets in
  render_error_fallback and FallbackWidget to prevent u16 overflow
  at extreme positions
- ansi.rs: Use saturating_add(1) for 0→1-indexed ANSI coordinate
  conversion in cup(), cha(), set_scroll_region()
- geometry.rs: Use saturating_sub in intersection_opt() for
  defense-in-depth on width/height calculation
- log_viewer.rs: Remove unused last_viewport_height Cell<usize>
  field (the LogViewerState u16 field is the one actually used)
- shakespeare.rs: Fix clippy manual_checked_ops lint with checked_div

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
